judgeScores.justification: The taxonomy intelligently groups files by domain (code, documents, photos) then by project or function, achieving an intuitive 2-3 level hierarchy with consistent snake_case naming. All ~80 files were relocated with no stragglers in root, and the MANIFEST clearly articulates the organizational rationale for each category. One minor refinement could be segregating work design assets (banners, mockups) from personal photos within the 2024 folder, though the chronological grouping remains defensible.
